description: Fetch and parse one Hugging Science topic file (topics/<slug>.md) into markdown or JSON, optionally filtered by section or tag.
rules: read-only — HTTPS GET against huggingscience.co, no mutation
SLUG required (e.g. biology, materials-science); normalized to lowercase-hyphenated
usage: Set SLUG (required). Optional: FILTER, TAG, FORMAT. Output: topic.out.
limitation: Needs network to reach huggingscience.co; offline the porter records the failure and emits a non-empty file. Slugs are best-effort — a 404 means the slug changed (use `raw` to refetch llms.txt).
